evaluation.criteria: Score 10: Correctly concludes Broadcom Inc., notes FY2023 net revenue (~$35.8B) exceeding Salesforce's FY2024 revenue (~$34.9B), confirms the San Jose-based HQ with a major operational hub in Singapore (legacy Avago), and documents Hock Tan's prior executive roles (e.g., at Integrated Circuit Systems or Commodore) and his MIT/Harvard education. All statements must link to publicly reported facts. Score 5: Names Broadcom but misses either the Salesforce revenue comparison or the Singapore operational context. Score 0: Misidentifies the company (e.g., confuses with Qualcomm) or fabricates revenue figures.
evaluation.details: Found expected answer "Broadcom Inc." in output
